title: Energy-Efficient Server Consolidation Algorithm
description: Algorithm to determine optimal virtual machine placement for server consolidation to reduce energy consumption
code:
PROCEDURE ServerConsolidation(vmList, serverList)
BEGIN
 sortedVMs = SortByResourceRequirement(vmList, DESCENDING)
 availableServers = InitializeServerPool()
 
 FOR each vm IN sortedVMs DO
 bestServer = NULL
 minLoadAfterPlacement = INFINITY
 
 FOR each server IN availableServers DO
 IF CanAccommodate(server, vm) THEN
 loadAfter = CalculateLoad(server, vm)
 IF loadAfter < minLoadAfterPlacement THEN
 minLoadAfterPlacement = loadAfter
 bestServer = server
 END IF
 END IF
 END FOR
 
 IF bestServer != NULL THEN
 PlaceVM(bestServer, vm)
 IF Load(bestServer) < LOW_THRESHOLD THEN
 MigrateOtherVMs(bestServer, availableServers)
 PowerDownServer(bestServer)
 END IF
 ELSE
 PowerUpNewServer(vm)
 END IF
 END FOR
 RETURN consolidationPlan
END
explanation: This algorithm optimizes VM placement to maximize server utilization, allowing underutilized servers to be powered down, thus reducing energy consumption. It sorts VMs by resource needs and finds the best server that can accommodate them without overloading.

title: Green Computing Resource Allocation
description: Algorithm for energy-aware resource allocation in cloud computing environment
code:
PROCEDURE GreenResourceAllocation(workload, availableResources)
BEGIN
 energyConsumption = 0
 carbonFootprint = 0
 allocationPlan = EmptyList()
 
 sortedResources = SortByGreenMetric(availableResources)
 
 FOR each task IN workload DO
 selectedResource = NULL
 minCarbonFactor = INFINITY
 
 FOR each resource IN sortedResources DO
 IF CanHandle(resource, task) AND 
 CarbonFactor(resource) < minCarbonFactor THEN
 selectedResource = resource
 minCarbonFactor = CarbonFactor(resource)
 END IF
 END FOR
 
 IF selectedResource != NULL THEN
 allocationPlan.Add(selectedResource, task)
 energyConsumption += CalculateEnergy(selectedResource, task)
 carbonFootprint += CalculateCO2(selectedResource, task)
 END IF
 END FOR
 
 RETURN allocationPlan, energyConsumption, carbonFootprint
END

FUNCTION CarbonFactor(resource)
BEGIN
 IF UsesRenewableEnergy(resource) THEN
 RETURN 0.1
 ELSE
 RETURN GridEmissionFactor(resource.location)
 END IF
END
explanation: This algorithm prioritizes resource allocation to servers with lower carbon footprint, preferring those using renewable energy sources. It helps reduce the overall carbon emissions of cloud operations.

title: E-Waste Management Tracking System
description: Algorithm to track and manage ICT equipment lifecycle for sustainable disposal planning
code:
PROCEDURE ManageEquipmentLifecycle(equipmentList)
BEGIN
 activeEquipment = FilterByStatus(equipmentList, 'ACTIVE')
 approachingEOL = EmptyList()
 recyclableItems = EmptyList()
 
 FOR each item IN activeEquipment DO
 age = CalculateAge(item.purchaseDate)
 expectedLife = item.manufacturerSpecifiedLife
 
 IF age >= (expectedLife × 0.9) THEN
 approachingEOL.Add(item)
 CalculateRecyclabilityScore(item)
 END IF
 
 IF age >= expectedLife THEN
 recyclableItems.Add(item)
 END IF
 END FOR
 
 schedule = CreateDisposalSchedule(approachingEOL)
 recyclerList = MatchWithCertifiedRecyclers(recyclableItems)
 
 materialRecovery = CalculateMaterialRecovery(recyclableItems)
 environmentalImpact = CalculateSavedImpact(materialRecovery)
 
 RETURN schedule, recyclerList, environmentalImpact
END
explanation: This system tracks equipment lifecycle to plan for proper e-waste management, identifying items approaching end-of-life and matching them with certified recyclers to maximize material recovery and minimize environmental impact.
